ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the plant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the plant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the plant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the plant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's department */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_types" (
  "process_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process type */,
  "process_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the process type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the process is monitored */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the process */,
  "process_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process type */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the process */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_process_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_type_id") REFERENCES process_types ("process_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "process_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the process at the given datetime */,
  "activation_flag" INTEGER /* Activation flag indicating whether the process was active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_process_data_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that generated the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., threshold breach, equipment failure) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, process update) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
